onboarding.title: Let's create your birth chart
onboarding.subtitle: Enter your birth details for a personalized experience
onboarding.name: Full Name
onboarding.personalizeHint: Help us personalize your experience. This is optional and can be changed later in Settings.
onboarding.fillBirthDetails: Please fill in your birth details before continuing.
onboarding.saveFailed: Could not save your birth information. Please check your connection and try again.
onboarding.cosmicFingerprint: Your cosmic fingerprint — the three signs that shape everything about who you are.
onboarding.justBeginning:
This is just the beginning. Your full chart has
10 planets, 12 houses, and dozens of aspects.

sunSoul.Aries: You were born to lead — not by title, but by example. You run toward the fire when everyone else runs away. Your life is a series of brave, impulsive leaps, and the universe rewards you for never asking permission.
sunSoul.Taurus: You were built for the long game. While others chase trends, you build empires out of patience and taste. Your greatest power is your refusal to be rushed — you know that everything worth having takes time.
sunSoul.Gemini: Your mind never stops. You see connections that nobody else notices, you speak in ideas, and you get bored the second something becomes predictable. You are not indecisive — you are multidimensional.
sunSoul.Cancer: You feel everything. The room, the silence, the thing nobody said out loud. Your emotional intelligence is your superpower, but it comes at a cost — you carry the weight of people who never asked you to.
sunSoul.Leo: You were born to be witnessed. Not out of vanity — out of a deep knowing that your light has a purpose. When you walk into a room, people feel it. Your challenge is learning that dimming yourself never serves anyone.
sunSoul.Virgo: You notice what nobody else sees. The crack in the system, the word out of place, the person who is quietly falling apart. Your mind is a precision instrument, and your purpose is to make broken things whole.
sunSoul.Libra: You understand people. The way they think, what they need to hear, the balance between too much and not enough. Your gift is harmony — your curse is losing yourself while trying to keep everyone else comfortable.
sunSoul.Scorpio: You live at a depth that most people cannot handle. You see through every mask, every lie, every polite surface. Your intensity is not a flaw — it is the engine of your transformation. You do not do half-measures.
sunSoul.Sagittarius: You were built for freedom. Not just travel — freedom of mind, belief, and spirit. You need a horizon to chase, a question to explore, and the absolute certainty that there is always something bigger waiting.
sunSoul.Capricorn: You understand that greatness is built, not born. While others dream, you plan. While others quit, you endure. Your ambition is not cold — it is the quiet fire of someone who refuses to waste their potential.
sunSoul.Aquarius: You think differently than everyone around you, and you have stopped apologizing for it. Your mind operates on a frequency that sees the future before it arrives. The loneliest thing about you is how often you are right.
sunSoul.Pisces: You exist between worlds. You feel the undercurrent of everything — the music beneath the silence, the dream beneath the reality. Your sensitivity is not weakness; it is the rarest form of intelligence.

moonHeart.Aries: Emotionally, you burn hot and fast. You feel things with your whole body — anger, passion, protectiveness. You do not sit with your feelings; you act on them. You need a partner who can match your fire without flinching.
moonHeart.Taurus: Your emotional world craves stability. You need routine, physical comfort, and a safe place to land. When you feel secure, you are the most generous person alive. When that security is threatened, you shut down completely.
moonHeart.Gemini: Your emotions move like weather — fast, changeable, and sometimes contradictory. You process feelings by talking about them, thinking about them, sometimes avoiding them entirely. Boredom is the emotion that hurts you most.
moonHeart.Cancer: Your emotional life is the center of your universe. You feel everything twice — once for yourself, once for the person next to you. Home is not a place for you; it is a feeling. And when that feeling is missing, nothing else matters.
moonHeart.Leo: You need to feel special. Not in a shallow way — in a bone-deep way. When the people you love make you feel seen, you glow. When they take you for granted, something inside you dims. Your heart runs on genuine recognition.
moonHeart.Virgo: You show love through doing, not saying. You worry about the people you care about — their health, their problems, the things they are not handling. Your emotional life is quiet, practical, and deeply devoted.
moonHeart.Libra: You need partnership to feel emotionally whole. Not in a codependent way — you simply process your feelings through connection. Conflict makes you physically uncomfortable. Beauty and harmony are not luxuries for you; they are necessities.
moonHeart.Scorpio: Your emotional life runs deeper than anyone will ever know. You feel things with devastating intensity, but you rarely show it. Trust takes years. Betrayal takes forever to forgive. When you love, you love with everything you have.
moonHeart.Sagittarius: Your emotions need room to breathe. You process feelings through movement, adventure, humor, and philosophical perspective. Emotional claustrophobia is your kryptonite — you need freedom even in your closest relationships.
moonHeart.Capricorn: You were taught early that emotions are not safe. You process feelings slowly, privately, and with a level of self-control that others mistake for coldness. But beneath that composure is a loyalty so fierce it can break you.
moonHeart.Aquarius: Your emotional world is unconventional. You care deeply about humanity but struggle with one-on-one emotional intimacy. You process feelings intellectually — stepping outside them to analyze rather than drowning in them.
moonHeart.Pisces: You feel everything — your own emotions, other people’s emotions, the collective mood of every room you enter. Your heart has no walls. This is both your greatest gift and the thing that exhausts you the most.

risingMask.Aries: People see you as bold, direct, and a little intimidating. You come across as someone who takes charge — the person others look to when nobody knows what to do. Your energy enters before you do.
risingMask.Taurus: People see you as grounded, attractive, and unapologetically real. There is a calm to your presence that makes others feel safe. You carry yourself with quiet confidence and an eye for beauty that people notice immediately.
risingMask.Gemini: People see you as witty, curious, and impossible to pin down. You come across as someone who is always thinking, always observing, and always slightly ahead of the conversation. Your versatility is disarming.
risingMask.Cancer: People see you as warm, protective, and emotionally present. You come across as someone who genuinely cares — and they are right. There is a softness to your face that draws people in, even when you are guarding yourself.
risingMask.Leo: People see you as magnetic, confident, and impossible to ignore. You walk into a room and the energy shifts. There is a warmth and generosity to your presence that makes people want to be near you — and they rarely know why.
risingMask.Virgo: People see you as composed, intelligent, and quietly put-together. You come across as someone who has it handled — even when you do not. There is a modesty to your presence that hides the sharpest mind in the room.
risingMask.Libra: People see you as charming, balanced, and aesthetically striking. You come across as someone who makes everything look effortless — including relationships. Your social grace is something people wish they could learn.
risingMask.Scorpio: People see you as intense, mysterious, and difficult to read. You come across as someone who sees right through people — and they can feel it. There is a power to your presence that makes others either deeply drawn to you or slightly afraid.
risingMask.Sagittarius: People see you as adventurous, optimistic, and refreshingly honest. You come across as someone who does not take life too seriously — which makes people trust you, because you are not performing. Your laughter is medicine.
risingMask.Capricorn: People see you as mature, ambitious, and quietly powerful. You come across as someone who has their life together — someone others respect before they even know you. There is an authority in your presence that you did not ask for.
risingMask.Aquarius: People see you as unique, independent, and slightly alien — in the best possible way. You come across as someone who genuinely does not care what others think, and that freedom is magnetic. People want what you have.
risingMask.Pisces: People see you as dreamy, gentle, and otherworldly. You come across as someone who exists slightly outside of normal reality — an old soul, an artist, a healer. People open up to you without knowing why.

Fire.name: Fire
Fire.feel: You are driven by passion, instinct, and an unshakeable need to make things happen. You run on inspiration — and you crash when it runs out.

Earth.name: Earth
Earth.feel: You are grounded, practical, and built for reality. You trust what you can see and touch. Your strength is endurance — your risk is resisting change when it is time to evolve.

Air.name: Air
Air.feel: You live in your mind. Ideas, connections, conversations — that is where you feel most alive. Your gift is perspective. Your shadow is disconnecting from your body and your heart.

Water.name: Water
Water.feel: You are driven by feeling. Your intuition, your empathy, your emotional depth — these are not soft skills, they are your primary intelligence. Your challenge is learning which feelings are yours.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Explore the cosmos at no cost
free.bestFor: Newcomers curious about astrology who want to explore before committing.

starter.name: Starter
starter.bestFor: Anyone ready to go beyond the basics with full natal charts and daily insights.

light.name: Light
light.bestFor: Casual explorers who want daily cosmic guidance and basic chart insights.

premium.name: Premium
premium.bestFor: Enthusiasts ready to dive deep into their full astrological blueprint and relationships.

pro.name: Pro
pro.bestFor: Professional astrologers and dedicated practitioners who need every tool available.

switch.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
switch.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you get immediate access to new features. When downgrading, your current benefits continue until the end of your billing cycle.

trial.question: What happens after the free trial?
trial.answer: Your 14-day free trial gives you full access to your chosen plan. You won't be charged until the trial ends, and you can cancel anytime before that with no obligation.

rollover.question: Do AI readings roll over?
rollover.answer: AI reading credits reset each billing cycle and do not roll over. This keeps our AI infrastructure fast and responsive for all users.

security.question: Is my birth data secure?
security.answer: Absolutely. All personal and birth data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never sell your data, and you can delete your account and all associated data at any time.
